audit_items.proof_trace: The two kmalloc calls in nfp_rtsym.c (rtsymtab at L117, cache at L124) are freed on all exit paths: error paths go through exit_free_rtsym_raw/exit_free_cache labels which call kfree in the correct order, and the success path frees rtsymtab at L145 before returning cache. The returned cache (strtab embedded as offset into same allocation) is freed by the sole caller in nfp_main.c at both the error unwind (L778) and normal shutdown (L818) paths.
